name: Mexico City
industries: Nearshoring coordination, banking transformation, shared-services centres and corporate headquarters drive CDMX hiring.
intro: Mexico City is the command centre of the nearshoring boom: corporates in Polanco and Santa Fe coordinate the factory build-outs happening across the Bajío, US firms expand their Mexican delivery and shared-services centres, and the banks fund it all through their own digital transformations. Project managers with international certification and cross-border fluency are the profile in shortest supply. Our current batches run live online on the IST schedule, which lands overnight in Mexico City — off-hours plainly, and this page is held as such rather than dressed up. Register interest for Americas-hours batches and you'll be contacted first when they open. Throughout: live weekend instruction in English, exam application guidance, full-length mock exams, and trainer access until you pass. Cohorts often include Mexican professionals preparing for US-facing delivery roles at nearshored operations.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Mexico City?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 09:30 PM – 06:30 AM CST (prev day) in Mexico City. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Mexico City?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Mexico City. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Mexico?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Mexico and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Mexico City sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Mexico accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Mexico City — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Mexico City: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
